snippet.title: Second Meeting | 31st Anniversary | 11 July 2026
snippet.description:
Praise be to God for His continued faithfulness for the past 31 years.
Please do join us for a time of corporate worship and exhortation.

Emmanuel House of Worship also meets for below programs:
👉Sunday Worship 1st Service (English) at 7:00 am IST
👉Sunday Worship 2nd Service (English & Telugu) at 9:00 am IST
👉Wednesday Bible Study at 7:00 pm IST
👉Youth Fellowship on every Sunday after the 2nd Service
👉All Day Prayer on Second Saturday at 10 am IST
